title: hieracium glaucum subsp. limonense
intro: Hieracium glaucum subsp. limonense, also known as Hieracium limonense, is a subspecies of the Hieracium glaucum plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula and used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Hieracium limonense typically involve infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as digestive issues and skin conditions.
